title: B2 long 50x +66.78% (EN)
body:
📊 Verified P&L — B2/USDT Long · 50x · +66.78% (21m)

The idea: B2 broke out of a tight consolidation on momentum — longed the breakout (flagged in the VIP stream).

The risk: stop was parked just below the breakout level before we entered, so a wrong read costs a defined amount and nothing more.

21 minutes, 50x — fast doesn't mean reckless. The speed came from the setup; the safety came from the stop being non-negotiable before entry. Leverage is the tool, the discipline lives in where you'd walk away.

⚠️ Past result, not a prediction. High leverage = high risk of total loss. Educational only, not financial advice.

#RealResults
